Hi Team,

Just confirming that Aramark will handle all catering for the September event.
They quoted $45 per person for lunch and $65 for dinner. Total estimated at
$55,000 based on 500 attendees. Payment due within 30 days of invoice.

The Convention Center requires all vendors to use Loading Dock B for deliveries
between 6am and 10am only. Security clearance forms must be submitted by
August 15, 2026.

Thanks,
Event Coordinator
